title: phaeneilema zeylanicum
intro: Phaenoplema zeylanicum, also known as Neelam or Neelmani, is a plant species belonging to the family Acacia. It is native to Sri Lanka and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Neelmani can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
